headline: Is It Time To Reassess Dollar General (DG) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: Wondering if Dollar General is priced for opportunity or disappointment right now? This article walks through the numbers so you can judge whether the current share price lines up with the underlying business. The stock closed at US$119.26, with returns of a 4.6% decline over 7 days, a 9.5% decline over 30 days, a 12.8% decline year to date, but a 34.7% gain over 1 year. The 3 year and 5 year returns stand at a 40.5% decline and a 40.3% decline respectively. Recent coverage has focused on...

headline: Is Costco Stock a Buy Now After Strong March Retail Sales?

headline: This is Why Dollar General Corporation (DG) is a Top Consumer Defensive Stock to Buy
summary: Dollar General Corporation (NYSE:DG) is one of the top consumer defensive stocks to buy now. On April 2, UBS reiterated a Buy rating on Dollar General Corporation (NYSE:DG) with a $168 price target. The positive stance comes on the heels of a meeting with the company’s CEO, COO, and CFO, which affirmed the company’s outlook. […]

headline: Dollar General Weighs AI Media Push Against Ongoing Class Action Risks
summary: Dollar General (NYSE:DG) is rolling out an expanded AI-powered in-store audio media network with QSIC, targeting coverage in 12,000 stores. The company is also approaching the final deadline for claims related to a class action settlement tied to alleged pricing discrepancies. Dollar General operates a large chain of discount retail stores focused on everyday essentials, often in smaller communities. The push into an AI-driven audio network signals a bigger role for in-store media, as...
